creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/> begins: 

> Explore a comprehensive list of FreeBSD books.

It's not comprehensive. 

(Technically, it's something like a list of AsciiDoc documents that have doctype book. (This is uncertain, because (bug 265276) the book of FAQ does not behave like a book.))

We can improve this by: 

* not describing the list as comprehensive
* including a link to <https://www.freebsd.org/publish/>.

----

Triage: CC doc@
